title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on communities, raising concerns about public safety.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop in Charlotte
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host the 2026 Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's growing importance as a hub for polymer technology and advanced manufacturing.

title: Suspect Arrested in Stabbing of Pregnant Woman in Charlotte
summary: Police have arrested a woman with an extensive criminal background for stabbing a pregnant woman in a random attack in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about violent crime and the safety of pregnant women in public spaces.

title: Repeat Offender Accused of Stabbing Pregnant Woman at Harris Teeter
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte Harris Teeter parking lot. She has nine prior convictions.
charlotte_impact: Focuses on repeat offenders and the potential failures of the justice system to prevent violent crime.

title: Braylon Clark Details Visit with Tennessee Football
summary: 2028 Charlotte Country Day wide-out Braylon Clark visits Knoxville.
charlotte_impact: Highlights local sports talent and the recruitment process for young athletes.

title: Choosing the Best Deck Builder in Charlotte
summary: Tips on selecting a qualified deck builder to enhance your home's outdoor living space and property value in Charlotte.

title: Students Design Brand for Brown Museum in Guilford County NC
summary: Charlotte Hawkins Brown's Canary Cottage is 100 years old.

title: Progress Made Against Avery County Wildfire
summary: The N.C. Forest Service reports the large wildfire in Avery County is now 75% contained as crews work to prevent further spread.
charlotte_impact: Provides updates on wildfire containment efforts and the protection of natural resources.

title: Mecklenburg County Deputy Fired After Domestic Violence Arrest
summary: Deputy Francisco Ramos was fired after being accused of assaulting his wife at their home. The Sheriff's department has a "zero tolerance" policy.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the seriousness of domestic violence and the accountability of law enforcement officers.

title: Investigation Underway in Business Center Parking Lot
summary: Investigators are looking into an 'incident' that occurred in a business center parking lot. Details are currently limited.

title: Data Center Debate Moves to Salisbury
summary: A proposal for a data center in Salisbury sparks debate amid a new county moratorium and calls for more public engagement.

title: Hickory Man Wins $100,000 from Losing Scratch-Off Ticket

title: Arrest Made in 1993 Rape of 79-Year-Old Charlotte Woman
summary: An arrest has been made in the 1993 rape of a 79-year-old Charlotte woman. The suspect was identified through extensive DNA analysis.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the power of DNA technology in solving cold cases and bringing justice to victims.

title: Motorcyclist Dies of Crash Injuries in Charlotte
summary: A motorcyclist has died from injuries sustained in a crash in the University City area of Charlotte on Sunday, April 19.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of motorcycle accidents and the importance of road safety.

title: Domino's and Coca-Cola Launch Nationwide Promo Code
summary: Domino's and Coca-Cola are honoring Dan with a nationwide promo: use code DANTHEMAN for a free 20 oz Coke from April 30 through May 3.
